sections.faq:
Can I use this plugin on any WordPress site?

No, this plugin is designed specifically for Patlis platform websites.

Does it support Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager?

Yes, the plugin includes built-in integration for Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager (GTM), with proper consent handling.

How does it handle user consent?

The plugin blocks scripts and tracking tools until the user gives consent, ensuring compliance with GDPR requirements.

Does it support external cookie tools?

No, it includes its own built-in cookie system and does not require third-party solutions.
